•1 review

We love using Migma! It has significantly boosted our productivity with its email generation, and the email designs are absolutely stunning. Highly recommend for anyone looking to elevate their email game!

Report

 361 views

Adam Lababidi

Migma AI

Migma AI

Thanks for the love Destoe! 🥂 Glad Migma is making your life easier.

Report [...] Migma is wild, and I believe it needs to be a standard part of every business tech rotation. It allows non-technical founders like myself the ability to make high-level emails, give the AI instructions to fix things/move things/re-work things, and have an elite-level email designer, without the high cost of an agency. And then I can export it directly into Klaviyo, ready to go.   
  
It gives people like me the ability to do what I don't have the technical skills to be able to do, and it gives people who do have the technical skills hyperdrive.   
  
Lifelong fan and client.

Cloud Computing Platforms

We needed something that wouldn't fall over when an agency sends 50,000 emails at 2am. Tried a few alternatives early on — they were fine until they weren't. AWS just works. SES for sending, the rest for infra. Boring choice, but boring is good when you're delivering other people's emails.
